title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, available in sizes from 9B to 397B parameters, built on Gemma and Qwen. The models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with MIT licensing and GGUF versions for local deployment. Testing shows the 35B variant performs well with agent tool calls and web search integration.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, a family of open agentic coding models from DeepReinforce that spans 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen. The models target coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, ship under MIT licensing, and offer GGUF versions for local deployment. Testing focuses on the 35B variant, which handles agent tool calls and web search integration well, demonstrating a fully local, private agent setup.
